children: The era of relying solely on massive data centers for AI power is ending. A new project, Off Grid, has just hit the top of Hacker News, showcasing a mobile-first approach to AI that runs entirely on your device.
Offline AI solves the three biggest hurdles for modern solo-builders: Latency, Cost, and Privacy.
Don't just build wrappers; build local. As a solopreneur, your competitive advantage is agility and lower overhead.
